zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Rocheford於大約1191年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓時，她的父親Thomas Rocheford29歲，母親Isabel Berkeley31歲。她於1212年與Andrew de La Bere在英國格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1233年12月29日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Rocheford于大约1191年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓时，她的父亲Thomas Rocheford29岁，母亲Isabel Berkeley31岁。她于1212年与Andrew de La Bere在英国格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1233年12月29日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rocheford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand.

variants.name: Rochefort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Adrien, Andre, Armand, Cecile, Celine, Dany, Gaetan, Herve, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Lucien.
French: habitational name from Rochefort, the name of several places in various parts of France.
English: variant of   Ratchford  . Compare   Rochford  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Rocheford was born about 1191, in Siston, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas Rocheford, was 29 and her mother, Isabel Berkeley, was 31. She married Andrew de La Bere in 1212, in Siston, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 29 December 1233, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Rocheford est née environ 1191, à Siston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Rocheford, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabel Berkeley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew de La Bere en 1212, à Siston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 décembre 1233, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Rocheford(이)가 대략 1191년 영국 그루스스터실르 시스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Rocheford(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Berkeley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1212년 영국 그루스스터실르 시스턴에서 Andrew de La Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 12월 29일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Rocheford родилась около 1191 г. в местности систон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Rocheford было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Berkeley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew de La Bere в 1212 г. в местности систон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 29 декабря 1233 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.
